title: Steam Integration Flow

steps: SVars holds static refs: net (SNet), stats (SStats), workshop (SWorkshop), user (SUser)
SStats schedules periodic timer every 4 min: if updated → stats.storeStats()
SWorkshop(): ugc.getSubscribedItems() → resolve install folders → classify into Map/Schematic/LoadedMod lists
SWorkshop: if any Map items found → Achievement.downloadMapWorkshop.complete()
SNet(): registers Events on ClientLoadEvent, WaveEvent, Trigger.newGame, PlayerIpBanEvent, PlayerIpUnbanEvent
smat.setLobbyData: name, mapname, version, versionType, wave, gamemode
[version mismatch] show version error, smat.leaveLobby(), return
[P2P connect fail] onP2PSessionConnectFail → disconnectSteamUser() or net.handleClientReceived(Disconnect)
Build Host objects, sort by player count desc
filter steam IPs, rebuild ban list
[already published] viewListing(p) → query UGC details → show owner dialog or open overlay
[OK] itemHandlers.first().get(publishedFileID) → calls update(p, id, null, true)
tagger: setItemTitle, setItemDescription, setItemTags, setItemPreview, setItemContent
Periodic timer (every 4 min): if updated → stats.storeStats()

key_relationships: SVars is static registry holding SNet, SStats, SWorkshop, SUser instances
SNet implements NetProvider + SteamNetworkingCallback + SteamMatchmakingCallback + SteamFriendsCallback
SNet wraps provider (ArcNetProvider) and delegates non-Steam calls to it
SNet.SteamConnection extends NetConnection; serializes via PacketSerializer over P2P
SWorkshop implements SteamUGCCallback; uses SVars.user.user.getSteamID() to check item ownership
SWorkshop uses SVars.net.friends to open Steam overlay pages
SStats implements SteamUserStatsCallback; calls service.init() after stats received
SUser implements SteamUserCallback; exposes SteamUser handle for ID lookups
Achievement enum used for milestone tracking in SWorkshop (publishMap, downloadMapWorkshop)
conditions_and_branches: connectClient: steam: prefix → P2P lobby join; else → TCP provider
sendClient: isSteamClient() → P2P send; else → provider
disconnectClient: isSteamClient() → leave lobby; else → provider
onLobbyEnter: response != Success → show error; version mismatch → version error; ok → connect flow
onLobbyMatchList: skip hidden=true, version-mismatch, empty-mode lobbies; check ban list
onLobbyCreated: result==OK → set lobby data; not server → ignore
publish: hasSteamID → viewListing; else prePublish check → showPublish
onCreateItem: OK → call update handler; FAIL → show error
onSubmitItemUpdate: OK → open overlay + run updated callback; FAIL → show error
onLobbyChatUpdate: Disconnected/Left → client disconnects if host left; server removes user
update(): changelog==null → Private visibility + '<Created>' note; else → use provided changelog
important_notes: Steam App ID is 1127400 (SVars.steamID). Lobby metadata keys: name, mapname, version, versionType, wave, gamemode, hidden, banned. P2P reliability: packets >= 1000 bytes or flagged reliable use P2PSend.Reliable; StreamChunk uses ReliableWithBuffering. Stats saved every 4 minutes only if dirty. Workshop items classified by file extension (mapExtension, schematicExtension) or presence of mod.json/mod.hjson.
